zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Evered於1570年出生在英國多瑟特斯特拉頓時，她的父親John Evered46歲，母親Margery Saunders41歲。她於1589年10月28日與Nicholas Porter在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾曼瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1592年之後在英國英格蘭維爾爾特洛布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Evered于1570年出生在英国多瑟特斯特拉頓时，她的父亲John Evered46岁，母亲Margery Saunders41岁。她于1589年10月28日与Nicholas Porter在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾曼瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1592年之后在英国英格兰維爾爾特洛布利其。

variants.name: Everard
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Evered was born in 1570, in Stratton, Dorset, England, her father, John Evered, was 46 and her mother, Margery Saunders, was 41. She married Nicholas Porter on 28 October 1589, in Mancetter, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1592, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Evered est née en 1570, à Stratton, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Evered, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margery Saunders, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Porter le 28 octobre 1589, à Mancetter, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1592, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Oktober 1589 in Mancetter, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Lei sposato Nicholas Porter il 28 ottobre 1589, nel Mancetter, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Everedが1570年にイギリスドールセトストラットオンで生まれた時，父John Everedは46歳，母Margery Saundersは41歳であった。1589年10月28日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマンセッテルでNicholas Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1592年以後にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアトロウブリッジで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Evered(이)가 1570년 영국 도르세트 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Evered(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Saunders(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1589년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 먼스터에서 Nicholas Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1592년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Nicholas Porter em 28 de outubro de 1589, em Mancetter, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Evered родилась в 1570 г. в местности страттон, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Evered было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Saunders, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Porter 28 октября 1589 г. в местности мансеттир, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1592 г. в местности троубридж, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
